blocks.content: Sitting at the desk in the president's office, Lete made meaningless sounds as she stared at the wall.

blocks.speaker: Lete
blocks.content: Why do I feel so uneasy?
The fire resources were stable, and the circulation of the tributaries was running smoothly.

blocks.speaker: Lete
blocks.content: Monoras.
All her anxiety stemmed from the fact that the lowest-ranking demon in the underworld was nowhere to be seen.

blocks.speaker: Lete
blocks.content: No news since he left for Laviette? Did he get sidetracked again?
She slammed the desk and shook her head.

blocks.speaker: Lete
blocks.content: No, it can't be.
Despite being deceived by Monoras a billion times, she believed in him.

blocks.speaker: Lete
blocks.content: Surely, even in this unprecedented situation, he wouldn't… He's a manager, after all. Yes, it can't be.
Rian, a living spirit, was wandering the underworld with the karma chain broken.

blocks.speaker: Lete
blocks.content: Every being in the universe bears its own karma. It can't be surpassed.
Thus, a system error.
And only a handful of demons in the underworld could solve such a problem.

blocks.speaker: Lete
blocks.content: Annoying. As if I didn't have enough work already.
Feeling uneasy, Lete left the president's office and headed to the Karma Management Department.
On both sides of the corridor, numerous informers were monitoring the living spirit through visions.
Hah! Hah!
Among them, an informer was making excited noises and busily touching herself.

blocks.speaker: Riona
blocks.content: Riona.
In charge of Etella and Shagal, she turned hurriedly at Lete's voice.

blocks.speaker: Lete
blocks.content: Oh, President.
Lete placed a hand on her shoulder.

blocks.speaker: Lete
blocks.content: You're working hard. These are the ones, right? I heard they made the rankings this time.
Riona spoke excitedly.

blocks.speaker: Riona
blocks.content: Yes, they're ranked seventh in history. Purification time is 87 years. How immense must the combined good and evil be? Just imagining it makes me feel so hot I can't stand it.
Lete felt dizzy as well.

blocks.speaker: Lete
blocks.content: Taiji is the signal that birthed the universe. The circulation of yin and yang contains immense power. It combines two opposing concepts into one.
Riona looked at Lete.

blocks.speaker: Riona
blocks.content: Then the first universe was also born through circulation. What concept circulates?
Lete raised her index finger.

blocks.speaker: Lete
blocks.content: Probably… electricity.
Only a manager could guess this.

blocks.speaker: Lete
blocks.content: Energy generated by the circulation of positive and negative poles. Thus, every concept born from that energy principle is divided into two, and that's our universe.
Lete raised her index finger.

blocks.speaker: Lete
blocks.content: Reality and the underworld. The reason two completely different worlds can coexist is because they were designed with the principle of Taiji. But when applied to humans, it's very dangerous.
Why?

blocks.speaker: Lete
blocks.content: It has the property of reversing all definitions of the universe. What happens when good and evil, black and white, material and immaterial, up and down, all concepts are integrated?
The first one.

blocks.speaker: Lete
blocks.content: The only concept that can transcend the universe is born. That's what we call the First One. It's no wonder those two bear immense karma.
Riona swallowed hard as she looked at the screen.

blocks.speaker: Riona
blocks.content: …An incredible connection.
Hoho! This is just the beginning. Those bearing karma can never be at ease, so it's best to keep watching.
Humans couldn't understand, but the combination of good and evil evoked a strange romance in demons.

blocks.speaker: Lete
blocks.content: I hope it turns out well.
She didn't know what the outcome would be.

blocks.speaker: Lete
blocks.content: By the way.
Lete licked her lips and asked.

blocks.speaker: Lete
blocks.content: Any news from that pig? No informers spotted him?
No. The chief secretary is also a manager, so tracking him through the karma screen has its limits. Anyway… there's no report of him being found near Laviette.
Lete grabbed her head.

blocks.speaker: Lete
blocks.content: Hah, what is he doing? He'll do well, right? Yes, he'll do well. I sincerely asked him, so he'll handle it properly this time. Right?
Riona twisted her lips.

blocks.speaker: Riona
blocks.content: I doubt it.
Perhaps Lete was the person who knew Monoras the least in the underworld.
River of Depravity, 78th Tributary
The village along the snake-like river of fire was a marquisate in the underworld.
The marquis was Picaras.
As the manager of a tributary with an average daily purification time of 3.5 million hours, he was currently entertaining Monoras.

blocks.speaker: Picaras
blocks.content: Come, come! Our chief secretary, who does great work for the underworld. Have a drink.
The marquis, with a snake's face, poured a drink for the pig-headed Monoras.
Good, good! Quack quack quack!
The Marquisate of Picaras was still less than halfway to his business trip destination.
The marquis gave orders.

blocks.speaker: Picaras
blocks.content: Come on, you lot! Why aren't you moving quickly? We're hosting such a magnificent and handsome guest.
As twenty succubi got to work, Monoras drooled.
Quack! Quack!
As the atmosphere heated up, the marquis subtly handed over some documents.

blocks.speaker: Monoras
blocks.content: Huh? What's this?
The title read '78th Tributary Expansion Development Report,' but he didn't read the contents.

blocks.speaker: Picaras
blocks.content: The number of demons in the marquisate has increased significantly. And with more demons, there are more mouths to feed, right?
Yes, yes.
Monoras just wanted to focus on his senses.

blocks.speaker: Picaras
blocks.content: So I've come up with a solution. If our influential chief secretary from the Fire Corporation would just sign…
Monoras slammed the table, scattering the succubi.
o 으9
As he reacted sensitively, Picaras turned and clapped.
An attendant with ram's horns bowed and brought in a small box.
You'll understand when you see this…
Opening the box revealed a golden key the size of a human palm.
A key made of pure flame…
Monoras slammed the table, scattering the succubi.
Picaras, you scoundrel!
With a voice full of tension, Picaras quickly bowed.

blocks.speaker: Picaras
blocks.content: Yes, yes!
Are you insulting me? Do I look like someone who would handle official duties for such a trinket?
Understanding perfectly, the marquis, half-rising in haste, shouted.

blocks.speaker: Picaras
blocks.content: Bring it in!
This time, the door burst open, and burly demons brought in a huge treasure chest.
Thud! Thud! Thud!
There were four in total, and Picaras hurriedly inserted the golden key.
Opening the lid revealed a blinding pile of treasures.
Turning awkwardly, Picaras pointed to the treasure chests.

blocks.speaker: Picaras
blocks.content: The one who holds this key is worthy of owning this treasure, or something like that.
Staring intently at the chests, Monoras suddenly threw back his head and laughed.
Guffaw! Quack! Quack!
Haha! Hahaha!
As Picaras laughed along, the succubi clapped and flew back in.

blocks.speaker: Picaras
blocks.content: You're generous! That's why I recognize you!
Of course. It's all thanks to you, Chief Secretary, for handling official duties so well.
Returning to the table, Picaras subtly handed over the documents.

blocks.speaker: Monoras
blocks.content: Quack! I always do well. Now, what were we talking about? Something about the tributary?

Oh, it's nothing to worry about. Honestly, someone who controls the fires of the entire underworld shouldn't be concerned with such minor tributaries. The underworld wouldn't function otherwise. There are demons who handle the big picture.
That's what I'm saying! You know it, but the president, Lete, doesn't. Isn't that frustrating?
It is.
Picaras snapped his fingers.

blocks.speaker: Picaras
blocks.content: Now I see why our chief secretary looks so troubled. At times like this, subordinates should take proper care. I'll start by paying attention!
Guffaw, well, you're doing well.
As Picaras quietly handed over the pen, Monoras signed the approval line with a bloody signature.
Bravo! Truly straightforward!
As the succubi laughed and clapped, Picaras waved his hand.

blocks.speaker: Picaras
blocks.content: What are you doing outside? Bring it in quickly!
Carts loaded with food and drink endlessly filled the table and then left.

blocks.speaker: Monoras
blocks.content: Have a drink. There are succubi lined up outside the castle.
Guffaw! Really?
